blended.narrative: Cascade Mountain is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 4.0 inches of wet, heavy snow expected. Snow levels around 967 ft. Looking ahead, 19 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Sunday: 8" of heavy snow, highs of 34°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Monday: 9" of heavy snow, highs of 28°F, winds around 21 mph. Expect powder.
